title: Aha! packages AI search and assistant controls with governance language
claim: Aha! Knowledge emphasizes AI-powered search, translation, and account-level controls, including statements that account data is not used to train external models.
source_snippet: AI search and translation stay current as content changes, with account-level controls.
implication: ProductOS research features should include governance posture, workspace access controls, and freshness-aware retrieval rather than only generation.
followup_questions: Which of Aha!'s AI controls should be mirrored as ProductOS source-access constraints?
